name: chain_4day_saas_validation_vibe_coding_gemi
method: 4-day saas validation. vibe coding. gemini flash stack. stripe day 1.

stages.task: scan ALPHA_STAGING + APP_IDEATION_RESULTS for unfilled SaaS niches with <3 competitors and >1K monthly searches
scaffold MVP from top idea using app_factory templates + wire Stripe payment link via payment_integrator.py
deploy + submit to 5 directories + cold email 50 leads from INBOUND_LEADS.csv matching the niche
at 72h check signup count — if 0 signups mark KILL, if >5 signups mark DOUBLE_DOWN in APP_FACTORY_METHODS.csv
